hero.title: Create your own website brochure in minutes
hero.subtitle: No coding required. Choose from a variety of templates and customize them to fit your brand.
hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support background video.

footer.tagline: Discover attractions and enjoy local cuisine — an unmissable experience for every traveler.

productHook.title: Eatery Guide
productHook.description: Discover the best flavors of your life and remember our chef-prepared, nutritionally balanced salads made just for you.

productIntroduction.title: Explore Can Tho's Eatery Guide
productIntroduction.subtitle: Comprehensive guide to the 10 must-try restaurants and popular drink spots in Can Tho
productIntroduction.mainDescription: This is a specialized culinary travel guide for Can Tho, helping you discover the most attractive dining spots. The product is designed with a professional layout, containing detailed information, star ratings, convenient QR codes, high-quality images, and useful travel tips.
productIntroduction.highlight2: List of popular drink spots in Can Tho
productIntroduction.highlight3: QR codes, star ratings, and contact numbers
productIntroduction.feature1Desc: The 10 most famous restaurants in Can Tho, from traditional to modern cuisine
productIntroduction.feature2Desc: Each restaurant is rated with stars and reviewed by diners to help you make informed choices
productIntroduction.feature3Desc: QR codes with phone numbers make it easy to search and contact restaurants
productIntroduction.feature4Desc: High-quality images of dishes and restaurant spaces with detailed descriptions
productIntroduction.imagePlaceholder: Product Image - Can Tho Eatery Guide

productsSection.title: What emotions do you want to experience with our guests?

caesar.title: Front of the product
caesar.description: The front of the product features a modern, clean layout with a green-led palette. The logo and name are prominently placed with crisp print quality — ideal for display or gifting.

back.title: Back of the product
back.description: The back presents key details: ingredients, usage instructions, and a handy QR code. Clear, legible layout designed for shelf presence and shipping.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Share your information and we'll get back to you soon.

productPolicy.title: Product Usage Policy
productPolicy.subtitle: Learn more about our products, support policies and customer service

introduction.title: Product Introduction
introduction.description: Our products are designed with high quality, safety for health and practical applications. Each product undergoes thorough inspection before reaching customers.

exchange.title: Exchange and Return Policy
exchange.description: We are committed to 100% customer support. If the product is not as expected, you can exchange it or receive a full refund within 7 days from the date of receipt.

support.title: Customer Support Service
support.description: Our team of specialists is ready to assist you 24/7. Contact us via hotline to answer any questions.

flipbook.insideBody: This is an all-in-one notebook that stores all the moments and beautiful scenes of some of the locations in our products, so that everyone has a place to check-in and enjoy the spaces that you have never known. Everything is contained in this book.
flipbook.insideBackBody: Images are illustrative. For detailed and up-to-date information, please visit our website or contact us.
